'''Nelfrus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|369|Nelfrus}}</ref> located in the [[Nelfrus system/Legends|Nelfrus system]] of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Metharian Nebula Territories]] region<ref name="PotG3" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1stm}}
